items.title: Porsche loses speed on a curvy road
items.summary: Global deliveries slumped 15 per cent in the period, dragged down by a 21 per cent decline in China, Porsche said on Friday. European luxury brands are grappling with fierce local competition and an erosion in pricing power in the worlds' biggest car market.

items.title: Volkswagen's first-quarter deliveries drop 4% on weak China, US
items.summary: Once a key growth engine for German carmakers, China has become a major ‌challenge for Volkswagen and rivals Mercedes-Benz and BMW, as a cut-throat price war with fast-moving local brands ​squeezes margins.

items.title: Nissan zeroes in on China, Japan and US as lead markets
items.summary: The Japanese automaker has placed India in its ‘extend reach and support expansion’ bucket alongside Europe, Africa, Oceania, Latin America and ASEAN, while Mexico and the Middle East have been identified as highly valued markets.

items.title: Audi Q1 deliveries fall 6.1% on weak demand in China and North America
items.summary: Deliveries in China, Audi's largest ​market, dropped 12 per cent to 127,109 units, hurt by ​a global slowdown in the automotive sector.

items.title: Nissan Motor India opens 54 new touchpoints in Q1 2026, targets 400 outlets by FY27-end
items.summary: The company said the network push supports its product offensive strategy as it prepares to launch the new Nissan Gravite and upcoming Tekton and C-SUV 7-seater models.

items.title: New TVS Off-Road Bike Spotted In Apache RTX Manual – What Is It?
items.summary: A new TVS off-road bike has been leaked from an official blurb for Apache RTX 300 and it shows a completely new motorcycle The post New TVS Off-Road Bike Spotted In Apache RTX Manual – What Is It? appeared first on RushLane .

items.title: Industry Consortium LEAF Launched to Advance EV Charging Ecosystem for Two- and Three-Wheelers
items.summary: A new industry consortium, the Light Electric-Vehicle Acceleration Forum (LEAF), has been launched to support the development of a more integrated and interoperable charging ecosystem for electric two- and three-wheelers in India. The forum was inaugurated by H.

items.title: Porsche loses speed on a curvy road
items.summary: Porsche's US sales also fell in the first quarter, which it attributed to a high base from stronger Macan EV volumes during last year's launch period and the end of EV buying incentives.

items.title: Spark Minda Green Mobility forms JV with UK-based Turntide to develop next-gen powertrain solutions
items.summary: The JV, Spark Minda Turntide Pvt Ltd, is going to manufacture motor controllers, axial flux motors and thermal pumps for India’s growing EV market.

items.title: New Hyundai Venus EV Spied For The First Time
items.summary: Exterior profile of Hyundai Venus test mule appears largely the same as the recently unveiled concept model The post New Hyundai Venus EV Spied For The First Time appeared first on RushLane .

items.title: Lithium bulls set to gatecrash Chile's copper party
items.summary: China has steadily increased ​its share of global lithium demand over the ⁠past four years, rising from 75 per cent to nearly 90 per cent. The Guangzhou Futures Exchange price for lithium has established itself as an industry benchmark.

items.title: Study finds lead contamination around battery recycling units In Delhi-NCR, rest of India
items.summary: The report, "Soiled With Lead: From Battery Recycling", assessed contamination in and around authorised and unauthorised units across Delhi NCR, Haryana, Rajasthan and Uttar Pradesh.

items.title: UK awards £380 million grant to Tata Group’s Agratas for Somerset battery gigafactory
items.summary: The funding will support Agratas’ planned 40 GWh gigafactory in Somerset, expected to become the country’s largest EV battery manufacturing facility and a key supplier to Jaguar Land Rover.

items.title: Sona Comstar Hits 500 Million Differential Gears and 10 Million Differential Assembly Marks
items.summary: Sona BLW Precision Forgings Ltd. (Sona Comstar) announced on April 7, 2026, that it has manufactured 500 million differential gears and 10 million differential assemblies since its founding in 1995, crossing two production milestones that the company says reflect growing customer demand for its driveline components across electric and conventional vehicle platforms globally.

items.title: Valeo commissions e-axle line in Pune for Mahindra’s Born Electric platform
items.summary: French Auto component major Valeo has commissioned a new electric powertrain manufacturing line at its Pune facility, marking a fresh localisation push as it begins supplying integrated e-axles for Mahindra & Mahindra’s upcoming Born Electric vehicles. The newly inaugurated line will produce Valeo’s 3-in-1 e-axle, which integrates the motor, inverter and transmission into a compact unit.

items.title: Motherson Sumi Wiring Faces Near-Term Margin Heat as Copper Prices Climb
items.summary: Motherson Sumi Wiring India Ltd., a dominant player in domestic wiring harness market, is navigating a short-term margin squeeze as it waits for commodity costs to reflect in its contracts. The company, which controls over 55% of the passenger vehicle wiring market and 25% plus in two-wheelers, is currently grappling with a "timing gap" between rising copper prices and customer reimbursements.

items.title: New scheme in works to support domestic critical mineral processing plants: Mines Secretary
items.summary: The Ministry of Mines is planning a new scheme to boost domestic processing of critical minerals and strengthen the value chain, alongside efforts to scale up copper production.

items.title: JSW Group, NLC India among 25 companies in pre-bid meet for ₹7,280 cr rare earth magnet scheme: Sources
items.summary: The ₹7,280-crore initiative aims to select up to five entities to establish facilities with a combined capacity of 6,000 MTPA, crucial for EVs and renewable energy. Bids are due May 28.
